output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?motherLabel WHERE {
  ?character rdfs:label 'Percy Jackson' @en ; wdt:P25 ?mother .
  ?mother rdfs:label ?motherLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?motherLabel) = 'en')
}
output.result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:

| ----------------------- |
| Sally Jackson (lang:en) |
